steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which plant had the lowest average power generated per year in 2019. Look at the Average power generation (MWh/yr) column.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Wisconsin.": 3,999 MWh/yr — the smallest value in the column. ✓
  • "Michigan.": 10,693 MWh/yr — higher than Wisconsin, not the lowest. ✗
  • "Florida.": 193,864 MWh/yr — the highest value, not the lowest. ✗
  • "Indiana.": 19,751 MWh/yr — higher than Wisconsin. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
